comment: Pipeline registry consumed by scripts/auto_update.py. Each entry describes one refresh pipeline: how to invoke it, on what schedule, and what to do with its output. Schedules are evaluated by the cron entry that runs auto_update.py with --schedule=<level>. type=python entries are imported in-process; type=tsx entries are subprocessed via npx tsx.

pipelines.label: Singapore Parliament Hansard
pipelines.description: SPRS API scan for AI-related debates. Existing pipeline.

pipelines.label: YouTube AI videos
pipelines.description: Channel RSS+HTML scan, manual review queue. Daily because CNA/ST publish 30+ vids/day and our scrape window covers <24h.

pipelines.label: GitHub stars refresh
pipelines.description: Pull live stargazer counts and bump dataDate.

pipelines.label: Government AI policies
pipelines.description: Scan smartnation/MAS/IMDA/PDPC/AIVerify for new AI advisories.

pipelines.label: Ecosystem entities
pipelines.description: Scan e27/tech.gov.sg for new SG AI startups & government products. Auto-added entries marked _pendingReview.

pipelines.label: AI levers
pipelines.description: Scan IMDA/tech.gov.sg/EDB for new programmes / funds / data centre deals.

pipelines.label: AI startups
pipelines.description: Business Times tech RSS + AISG + EDB; surface funding rounds, exits, new SG AI companies.

pipelines.label: Legal framework
pipelines.description: Monitor sso.agc.gov.sg / MAS / PDPC for new AI-related legislation & regulatory guidance.

pipelines.label: AI talent programmes
pipelines.description: AISG / IMDA / GovTech for new training, scholarship, apprentice, K-12 AI education programmes.

pipelines.label: National AI tracker (6 dimensions)
pipelines.description: Surface new investment / talent / compute / adoption / research / governance data points.

pipelines.label: International benchmarking
pipelines.description: Stanford AI Index + IMD WCY for new annual reports; flag for manual data extraction.

pipelines.label: Evals: URL health + i18n coverage (Layer A)
pipelines.description: Sweep every sourceUrl/url in src/data/*.ts and assert reachability; assert all CJK string fields have *En + *Ja siblings. Layers B/C/D need a build and run via `npm run build && npm run eval` separately.
